nodes.name: Salmon Salad Wrap — Garden Veg Bake
nodes.description: name: Salmon Salad Wrap — Garden Veg Bake | short_description: Protein-packed salmon salad with yogurt dressing, celery and greens wrapped in a whole-wheat tortilla for a balanced lunch. | meal_sugges
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Salmon Salad Wrap — Garden Veg Bake - name: Salmon Salad Wrap — Garden Veg Bake | short_description: Protein-packed salmon salad with yogurt dressing, celery and greens wrapped in a whole-wheat tortilla for a balanced lunch. | meal_suggestion: Serve as a cold wrap for portability; for the Garden Veg Bake version, bake the salmon-yogurt mix with roasted vegetables briefly, then wrap or serve over greens. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich (canned salmon, Greek yogurt) with omega-3s; fiber from greens and celery; whole-wheat tortilla adds complex carbs; contains dairy; watch sodium from canned salmon.

nodes.name: Veggie Quesadilla — Garlic-Ginger Skillet
nodes.description: name: Veggie Quesadilla — Garlic-Ginger Skillet | short_description: A quick skillet veggie quesadilla on a whole-wheat tortilla with cheddar, bell pepper, spinach, and salsa. | meal_suggestion: Pair
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Veggie Quesadilla — Garlic-Ginger Skillet - name: Veggie Quesadilla — Garlic-Ginger Skillet | short_description: A quick skillet veggie quesadilla on a whole-wheat tortilla with cheddar, bell pepper, spinach, and salsa. | meal_suggestion: Pair with fruit or a simple bean salad to boost fiber and protein; consider adding avocado for healthy fats or using reduced-fat cheese to lower fat content. | nutrition_note: Fiber-rich whole-wheat tortilla and vegetables provide dietary fiber. Cheddar adds protein and calcium. Spinach and peppers supply vitamins A and C. Moderate fat from cheese; sodium level depends on salsa and cheese amount. For a lighter version, choose reduced-fat cheese or use less cheese.

nodes.name: Chicken Caesar Wrap — Classic Style
nodes.description: name: Chicken Caesar Wrap — Classic Style | short_description: A classic Caesar-inspired wrap with chicken, romaine, parmesan, and light Caesar dressing wrapped in a whole-wheat tortilla. | meal_sugge
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Chicken Caesar Wrap — Classic Style - name: Chicken Caesar Wrap — Classic Style | short_description: A classic Caesar-inspired wrap with chicken, romaine, parmesan, and light Caesar dressing wrapped in a whole-wheat tortilla. | meal_suggestion: Great quick lunch option. Pair with fruit or veggie sticks; to boost fiber, add extra veggies or use a higher-fiber wrap, and consider reduced-sodium dressing to lower sodium intake. | nutrition_note: Estimated per-wrap: 350–450 kcal, 25–35 g protein, 5–8 g fiber, 10–15 g fat; sodium approximately 500–800 mg. Provides lean protein and fiber; dressing and cheese contribute to fat and sodium.
